hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-extrabold tracking-tighter leading-[1.1]

motion_and_interaction.rules: No heavy animation libraries. Rely solely on Tailwind CSS transitions and keyframes.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) with increased shadow. Buttons scale slightly (scale-105).
motion_and_interaction.custom_keyframes: Add a floating animation in index.css for the hero macro pills: @keyframes float { 0% { transform: translateY(0px); } 50% { transform: translateY(-10px); } 100% { transform: translateY(0px); } } .animate-float { animation: float 4s ease-in-out infinite; }

Hero.layout: Two-column on desktop. Left: Text content, Right: Stylized Meal Card UI.
Hero.headline: The Nutrition Operating System for Institutions
Hero.subheadline: Students log meals manually. Institutions already know the menu. We bridge the gap with zero-effort nutrition tracking.
Hero.ctas: Primary (Sign Up) in solid emerald, Secondary (Login) as outlined/ghost. Both trigger EmailCaptureModal.
Hero.visual: A DOM-constructed UI card representing a meal. Center image (healthy salad), surrounded by absolute positioned 'macro pills' (Calories, Protein, Carbs, Fat) that use the .animate-float class. Background should have blurred gradient blobs for depth.

TheProblem.style: Use the 'Swiss/High-Contrast' archetype feel here. Big text, clear message.

HowItWorks.layout: 4-step horizontal flow or alternating vertical layout.
HowItWorks.style: Use lucide-react icons in soft mint circular containers. Connect steps with subtle dashed lines if horizontal.

WhoItsFor.style: Cards with soft off-white background, deep emerald headings, and simple illustrative icons.

Features.layout: 6-card CSS Grid (2x3 or 3x2 based on screen size).
Features.style: Bento-box inspired. White cards with border-slate-100, soft shadow. Top-aligned icons with bright accent colors.

VisionSection.layout: Full width, immersive. Use a very subtle mint background.
VisionSection.content: 'Built for the future of institutional nutrition'
VisionSection.style: No testimonials. Just pure, confident brand vision.

FinalCTA.style: Use 'gradients.brand_primary' for the background. White text. High contrast.

EmailCaptureModal.mobile_style: Bottom sheet: fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full bg-white rounded-t-3xl p-6 transform transition-transform.
EmailCaptureModal.content: Headline 'Mealypal isn\'t live yet — be first in line'. Input field + Notify Me button. Include a success state view.

hero_meal_image.description: Top view of a healthy salad bowl. Use this inside the stylized hero UI card, masked in a circle with rounded borders.

abstract_background_blob.description: Abstract green gradient. Use as a background image with heavy blur (backdrop-blur-3xl or opacity-20) behind the hero section to create an atmospheric glow.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the `no heavy animation libs` rule. Do NOT install framer-motion. Use vanilla CSS and Tailwind utilities.
Import Manrope font from Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@400;600;800&display=swap');
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="hero-signup-button"`).
Implement the floating macro pills in the Hero component using absolute positioning around the central meal image, utilizing standard CSS keyframes.
Make sure the EmailCaptureModal works responsively (sheet on mobile, centered modal on desktop) and simulates a success state upon submission.
